title: Add results check and debug output in podman_stop
body:
Add results check to make sure the container is not shows up after
it is stopped. And also add some debug lines to help to figure out
which step has problem if case failed.

comments.body: LGTM, happy to see checks on the actual results of the test

:pushpin: Commit 0ee32ce has been approved by `rhatdan`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
